home.heroTitle: Empowering Young Minds, Building Bright Futures
home.heroSubtitle: Vidya Vihar Inter College, Salarpur, Varanasi, provides a value-based, high-fidelity academic environment. We foster core values, physical fitness, and technological competence for students from Nursery to Class 12 standard.

about.title: About
about.historyDesc1: Founded in 1995, Vidya Vihar Inter College in Salarpur, Varanasi was established with a vision to provide quality and affordable education to the children of Varanasi and neighboring areas. Starting as a primary school with only 50 students, it has grown over the years into a renowned Inter College with over 1,200 students.
about.historyDesc2: Our mission is to foster a stimulating learning environment where students excel academically, develop critical thinking skills, and grow as morally upright individuals. We focus on holistic development through co-curricular activities, moral instruction, and physical education.
about.affiliation: Affiliated under UP Madhyamik Shiksha Parishad & aligned with CBSE syllabus recommendations.
about.founderDesc: "Education is not just about loading the mind with facts. It is about lighting a spark that inspires students to explore, create, and contribute to society. At Vidya Vihar, we strive to make this spark shine bright in every child."
about.founderName: - Shri R. K. Pandey, Founder & Chairman

admissions.title: Admissions 2026-27
admissions.subtitle: Join the Vidya Vihar family. Follow our simple admission procedure outlined below.

step1.title: Enquiry & Registration
step1.desc: Submit the online enquiry form or visit the school reception to obtain the prospectus.

step2.title: Document Verification
step2.desc: Submit required documents: Birth Certificate, Report Card, Transfer Certificate, and Aadhaar Card.

step3.title: Interaction/Test
step3.desc: A general interaction for junior classes and a baseline assessment test for senior classes.

step4.title: Fee Payment & Admission
step4.desc: Upon selection, pay the admission fee to secure the child's seat.

admissions.formSub: Submit this enquiry, and our admissions team will contact you within 24-48 hours.

labels.successMsg: Thank you for showing interest in Vidya Vihar Inter College. Our team will get in touch with you shortly on

portal.placeholderDesc: The School Portal features are part of Stage 2 of our digital transformation. We are currently implementing these systems. Thank you for your patience.
